short_answer.question: Explain how to estimate the product of 25 × 31 using the provided table. Name the mathematical concept used and show your reasoning.
short_answer.answer: The concept used is estimation. To estimate 25 × 31, one can round 31 to 30. Then, 25 × 30 = 750. This matches the value provided in the estimation table.

short_answer.question: Compare the division problems 340 ÷ 34 and 340 ÷ 17. Explain why the quotient changes when the divisor is halved.
short_answer.answer: The concept is the relationship between the divisor and the quotient. When the divisor is halved from 34 to 17, the quotient doubles. For example, 340 ÷ 34 = 10, while 340 ÷ 17 = 20.
